team_name: TenderMind AI — Evidence-Backed Procurement Intelligence System for Fraud Detection and Eligibility Verification in CRPF Tender Evaluation
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement departments. The platform will use AI for document understanding and analysis, and provide features like risk dashboard, human-in-the-loop review system, and audit trail.
optimization_claims: Detecting discrepancies earlier in the review process
Supporting accountable and auditable procurement decisions
